programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of Texas, Mike and Frank play a couple of hands of Texas Pick'em with some savvy collectors.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: Leron and Porkchop follow a trail of bent hooks and broken branches to hunt down the monster gator known as Freddy Krueger; Daniel sets a 15-gator quota for each of his family's boats; Joey and Kallie grind through rising water and fading luck to rise to the occasion; Jacob and Little Willie train the next generation to carry on the Landry legacy; Chase struggles to capitalize on access to a once-in-a-lifetime honey hole.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: Troy brings in a secret weapon, his own mother, to push Pickle harder than ever; Bruce and Anna go after a big gator that got away, while Leron and Porkchop chase a rare chance to secure 15 extra tags for next season; with Joey stranded at St. Mary's, Kallie heads into the swamp alone for the first time-and Don and Calum come face-to-face with a monster lurking just beneath the surface.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: With water levels at record highs, Troy and Pickle gamble on a rarely accessible honey hole to make a dent in their tag count; chasing a tip from an old-timer, Ronnie and Timmy hunt for a record-breaking gator named Sasquatch; Leron and Porkchop face disaster when the changing tide threatens to trap their boat; Don and Calum go shot-for-shot in a sniping competition; while Daniel and Zak pivot to a risky new strategy-netting fresh mullet for bait, in hopes of luring in giants.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: With only two days left in the season, Troy and Pickle chase a line-popping gator nicknamed "Lucky"; Jacob and Little Willie face off in a high-stakes rifle-versus-treble-hook showdown; in cattle country, Joey and Kallie gamble on an new bait to help them tag out early; Daniel and Zak battle brutal, boat-rocking giants to try and bring their season to a close; Ronnie and Timmy put their fate in the hands of Salvation Bayou, as they fight to end their gator season with a bang.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: On the final day of gator season, with record-low water turning the swamp into a tough battleground in memory, every team races against the clock to tag out before sunset; Troy and Pickle grind through bad conditions; Jacob and Little Willie lean on family tradition and a treble hook to haul in monster after monster; Bruce and Anna refuse to quit on Six Mile Lake; Don and Calum battle doubt and falling water levels to prove their worth; Leron and Porkchop come up empty.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Best Of
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars go giddy for the toys from their past as well as some for newer generations.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A customer walks into the shop with a camera that shot the first footage of Elvis; Chum tries to dig up some info on a mysterious fossil; Rick tries to strike black gold with a Standard Oil stock certificate.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick flies to Washington, D.C., to see one of the first Jeeps built for use in WWII; a magic lantern image projector from the early 20th century; a fortune-telling gambling machine.

programme.title: 1776 USA Pure Gold
programme.desc: Celebrate the 250th Anniversary of American Freedom with this Gold 1776-2026 American Gold Eagle graded PF70UCAM. Encapsulated in a 1 of 250 40th Anniversary holder with the First Day of Issue designation, this is a once in a lifetime American coin!

programme.title: 1776 USA Pure Gold
programme.desc: Celebrate the 250th Anniversary of American Freedom with this Gold 1776-2026 American Gold Eagle graded PF70UCAM. Encapsulated in a 1 of 250 40th Anniversary holder with the First Day of Issue designation, this is a once in a lifetime American coin!

programme.title: Rare USA Silver Set
programme.desc: This patriotic Set of 29 American Silver Eagles features every annual release of the series from the first year of issue in 2000 to 2026, each coin graded MS69. This set includes the final 2021 Type 1 and first Type 2 with a bonus 2025 Eagle Privy.

programme.title: Rare USA Silver Set
programme.desc: This patriotic Set of 29 American Silver Eagles features every annual release of the series from the first year of issue in 2000 to 2026, each coin graded MS69. This set includes the final 2021 Type 1 and first Type 2 with a bonus 2025 Eagle Privy.

programme.title: Amazing Facts With Doug Batchelor
programme.desc: Pastor Doug Batchelor reveals facts about biblical events and brings new insight to frequently asked questions in Christianity.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: In this weekly program, Dr. David Jeremiah delivers practical messages to the congregation at the Shadow Mountain Community Church in San Diego. Also featured is music from the Shadow Mountain Community Church Choir and Orchestra, as well as performances by musical guests that have included Steve Green and Charles Billingsley. Men and women who have been impacted by the Turning Point ministry also share their stories with viewers. During the month of December, "Turning Point" usually features special Christmas programming.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets
programme.desc: Surveillance methods of the government and how NSA decided to monitor American's correspondence after 9/11.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets
programme.desc: The world surrounding gold, the highly prized metal, and why people go will go to great lengths to obtain it.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets
programme.desc: The secret of the stealthlike soldiers; they are the most expertly trained secret weapon of the United States.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets
programme.desc: Exploring the threats facing the United Sates, including atom bombs, cyber warfare and deadly viruses, and what the government is doing to protect the nation from ultimate disaster.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets
programme.desc: A look inside America's maximum-security "secret" prisons, unveiling their hidden agendas and covert operations.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets
programme.desc: Exploring underground facilities in the United States, which could hold dangerous secrets.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: From ancient religious texts buried in Egypt to cultural relics found at sea, or even a tower of skulls hiding under the earth, these lost artifacts change what is known about certain sacred beliefs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: The world's greatest fortunes often surface in the most unlikely places. From a Fabergé egg found at a humble flea market, to rare baseball cards hidden inside an old piano, or even a backyard sapphire worth a king's ransom. These treasures prove that sometimes one person's forgotten clutter can become another's once-in-a-lifetime discovery.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: From a Chinese curse that turns out to be real, to human remains in a Founding Father's basement, or even a mysterious island in Central Asia with enough pathogens to kill the entire global population several times over.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: A forgotten manuscript in a dusty trunk; a priceless painting discovered in plain sight; a royal tomb hidden for millennia beneath the sands; these famous finds prove history's greatest treasures often resurface when least expected.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: From a bat swung by one of baseball's boldest pioneers, to an iconic painting hidden behind a false wall, and even a relic tied to our nation's first president, these astonishing finds prove that America's greatest treasures can turn up in the most unlikely places.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: Forget the monsters under your bed; the real ones, from dinosaurs to mythic beasts, are out there just waiting to be unearthed.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: Some discoveries come with consequences; gold that ruins lives, a cursed wreck beneath the sea, and a hidden safe linked to a famous burglar, show how the past can be as dangerous as it is tempting.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: From Mussolini's hidden bunker, to a warship built to dominate, and coins bearing Henry VIII's authority, these discoveries reveal how power leaves its mark long after its rulers are gone.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: History's biggest discoveries aren't always its best. A diamond heist that unravels in a ditch, a colossal burning crater dubbed the "Gateway to Hell," and an island dominated by venomous vipers prove that when finds go big, they can also go very bad.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There: Alien Edition
programme.desc: A shadowy figure appears inside a Miami mall; a group of hikers in Bolivia see a translucent figure walking along a remote riverbank. Caught on camera and witnessed up close, these chilling sightings raise a terrifying question: are aliens living among us? Tony Harris and his team investigate the evidence to uncover the truth.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: From James Bond's legendary submarine car uncovered in a storage unit, to a rock-and-roll guitar with a past as loud as its sound, and locomotives resting side by side on the ocean floor, these heavy-metal marvels prove history's strongest secrets can't stay buried.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: History's biggest discoveries aren't always its best. A diamond heist that unravels in a ditch, a colossal burning crater dubbed the "Gateway to Hell," and an island dominated by venomous vipers prove that when finds go big, they can also go very bad.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: From Mussolini's hidden bunker, to a warship built to dominate, and coins bearing Henry VIII's authority, these discoveries reveal how power leaves its mark long after its rulers are gone.

programme.desc: From James Bond's legendary submarine car uncovered in a storage unit, to a rock-and-roll guitar with a past as loud as its sound, and locomotives resting side by side on the ocean floor, these heavy-metal marvels prove history's strongest secrets can't stay buried.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There: Alien Edition
programme.desc: A shadowy figure appears inside a Miami mall; a group of hikers in Bolivia see a translucent figure walking along a remote riverbank. Caught on camera and witnessed up close, these chilling sightings raise a terrifying question: are aliens living among us? Tony Harris and his team investigate the evidence to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Historic Silver Set
programme.desc: Add the stunning Set of 25 1878 San Francisco to 1921 Philadelphia Morgan Silver Dollars graded in Mint State 63 condition to your collection. Out of all Morgan Silver Dollars produced by the US Mint, only 1.7% have survived in Mint State condition!

programme.title: Historic Silver Set
programme.desc: Add the stunning Set of 25 1878 San Francisco to 1921 Philadelphia Morgan Silver Dollars graded in Mint State 63 condition to your collection. Out of all Morgan Silver Dollars produced by the US Mint, only 1.7% have survived in Mint State condition!

programme.title: Rare Limited Silver
programme.desc: Secure the lowest mintage Philadelphia Proof Silver Eagle ever issued by the US Mint with this 2026 Congratulations Set Silver Eagle graded PF70UCAM; this coin boasts a minuscule 60,000 mintage limit, housed in a signed First Day of Issue holder.

programme.title: Rare Limited Silver
programme.desc: Secure the lowest mintage Philadelphia Proof Silver Eagle ever issued by the US Mint with this 2026 Congratulations Set Silver Eagle graded PF70UCAM; this coin boasts a minuscule 60,000 mintage limit, housed in a signed First Day of Issue holder.

programme.title: Amazing Facts With Doug Batchelor
programme.desc: Pastor Doug Batchelor reveals facts about biblical events and brings new insight to frequently asked questions in Christianity.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: In this weekly program, Dr. David Jeremiah delivers practical messages to the congregation at the Shadow Mountain Community Church in San Diego. Also featured is music from the Shadow Mountain Community Church Choir and Orchestra, as well as performances by musical guests that have included Steve Green and Charles Billingsley. Men and women who have been impacted by the Turning Point ministry also share their stories with viewers. During the month of December, "Turning Point" usually features special Christmas programming.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Counting down ten unexplainable technologies in history, from mysterious golden orbs discovered in Mexico and a sacred wooden box that could communicate with the heavens to an ancient tomb that is said to depict an astronaut.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Researchers ask if Cloud computing represents the rediscovery of an ancient repository of knowledge known as the Akashic Record; neuroscientist Dr. Dario Nardi measures the brainwaves of Dr. Deepak Chopra as he enters a state of deep meditation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Researchers find that dozens of megalithic sites across the globe were designed to emanate the exact same frequency, causing them to speculate that certain frequencies may allow humans to connect with extraterrestrial forces.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: A look at the possibility that the human brain possesses extraordinary untapped abilities granted by extraterrestrial beings -- such as telepathy, precognition and psychokinesis; abilities that will enable the next step in the evolution of humans.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Archaeologists discover that many ancient sites were constructed with an acoustic purpose and often resonate at a frequency that has a profound effect on the human brain; questioning whether ancient people used these sites to contact alien beings.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: In the early 1900s, Edgar Cayce, a modern-day prophet from the hills of Kentucky, becomes a worldwide sensation; he claims to receive visions of the past and future, he heals the sick, and alleges to have encounters with otherworldly beings.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: In the nearly 2,000-year-old text called "The Zohar," there is a curious passage that describes hidden realms beneath the surface of the Earth, each of which is said to be populated by both human and non-human intelligences.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Terrifying encounters at 40,000 feet; pilot accounts of UFOs taking control of their aircraft; entire jumbo jets disappearing into thin air; since the dawn of aviation, pilots have experienced unexplainable events in the sky.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
